safety_corrections: Real /graph run no longer uses FakeWorkerBackend.
Fake execution is limited to /swarm run --fake, /swarm benchmark --fake, and tests.
Active graph runs are attached by session_id and repo root instead of a global cwd pointer.
[orchestration] startup defaults are parsed and applied with requirements re-applied above project config.
Fast service-tier rejection fallback retries once only for typed service_tier 400/422 errors.
Fast requested preference is persisted in summary.json and effective support is recomputed on resume, fork, and provider/model changes.

verification.rustfmt_targeted: passed for owned service-tier, sampler, AgentGraph, Ultra, slash-command, persistence, and worker-isolation files
verification.sampling_types: passed: 284 tests, 0 failed; doctests passed with one ignored
verification.provider_wire: passed after correcting one trailing-space fixture: 14 tests, 0 failed
verification.agentgraph_shell: passed: 28 tests, 0 failed, including exact-100 fake benchmark, resource safety, replay, durable controls, real subagent backend, Ultra, and fake app-server lifecycle
verification.focused_shell: passed: Fast persistence 4, orchestration config 4, runtime sampling 3, Ultra 8, Fast summary round trip 1
verification.broad_fmt: failed due formatting drift in mixed concurrent account/context-compaction and fallback-provider files; unrelated files were not rewritten
verification.broad_clippy_and_pager: not executed because a concurrent task held Cargo's default build lock with a large pager build

source_stability.meaning: Owned implementation, docs, and focused validation are reconciled; the declared feature and broad-validation gaps remain.

smooth_software.reason: Skipped because the working tree has mixed uncommitted edits from multiple agents; targeted polish was safer.

non_goals_preserved: No automatic Fast through Ultra or Swarm.
No fake completion for real /graph run.
remaining: Complete or explicitly defer settings modal controls for orchestration defaults.
Complete graph-wide runtime budget enforcement, retries, loops, compensation, fairness/rate adaptation, and automatic process-start recovery.
Add structured AgentGraph ACP/headless approval methods and concrete model-selector resolution.
Run broad clippy and pager command filters after the concurrent pager build releases Cargo's default build lock.
